case_number: Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Appln No.S-311 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of post-arrest bail 19-5-2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G along with SIP Abdul Karim -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing at some length, learned counsel for the applicant submits that he would be satisfied and does not press the instant Criminal Bail Application, if the trial Court is directed to conclude the trial within the shortest period of time. This proposal has not been opposed by the learned Additional Prosecutor General. In view of the above, the instant Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not pressed, with a direction to the trial Court to conclude the trial within ninety days. No unnecessary adjournment shall be granted to any of the party. If the trial Court is of the view that the complainant party is avoiding the proceedings, it shall be at liberty to issue coercive process against them in accordance with law. JUDGE Naveed Ali
